name: elevenlabs_clone_voice
description: Clone a voice from local audio sample file(s) using ElevenLabs Instant Voice Cloning. The cloned voice becomes available in the BlackBox voice selector for text-to-speech. Use when the user wants to create a custom voice from a recording they provide (e.g. an uploaded audio sample). REQUIRES explicit consent: you must first confirm the user owns or has permission to clone the voice, then pass confirm_consent=true.

name.description: Display name for the cloned voice (how it will appear in the voice selector).

audio_paths.description: Local file paths to one or more audio samples to clone from (e.g. session-upload paths). More/cleaner samples improve the clone.

confirm_consent.description: Set true ONLY after the user has explicitly confirmed they own or have permission to clone this voice. You MUST ask and get confirmation first — refuse otherwise.

description.description: Optional short description of the voice.

returns: The cloned voice's id (prefixed elevenlabs:<id>) and a confirmation it is now in the voice selector.
notes: Consent gate is enforced in the executor: without confirm_consent=true NO voice is created. Cloning consumes account voice slots — Starter tier is limited.
